faq.question: Can I add catalog?
faq.answer: Yes, product cards with photos and descriptions are created.

faq.question: Does it work for secondhand store?
faq.answer: Yes, builder creates sites for any clothing store types.

faq.question: Can I add prices?
faq.answer: Yes, prices are specified in product cards.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Free plan allows creating a basic landing page.
